channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos Jr. to Visit Japan in May to Strengthen Bilateral Relations
item.description: Pangulong Ferdinand Marcos Jr. ay nakatakdang magsagawa ng isang state visit sa Japan sa darating na Mayo, ayon sa ulat ng ABS-CBN News. Bagamat limitado ang detalye sa inilabas na balita, ang ganiton...

item.title: Former owner of Home Alone house dies by apparent suicide days after child sexual abuse material charges
item.description: John Abendshien, aged 79 and the former owner of the iconic house featured in the 1990 film Home Alone, was found dead at Derwen Mawr Nature Preserve in Lake Forest, Illinois. His body was discovered ...

item.title: Duterte’s ICC Trial Likely to Start Between October 2026 and February 2027
item.description: Former President Rodrigo Duterte's trial before the International Criminal Court (ICC) may commence between October 2026 and February 2027, according to ICC Assistant to Counsel Kristina Conti. The tr...

item.title: A closer look at the origins of Jean Valjean in this Les Misérables prequel
item.description: Jean Valjean’s story, long known through various cinematic renditions, gets a deep dive into its origins in this 2026 film directed by Eric Besnard. The narrative focuses on Valjean's troubled beginni...

item.title: Metropolitan Opera Loses Saudi Funding Due to Iran Conflict Economic Impact
item.description: The Metropolitan Opera announced that its planned multimillion-dollar funding agreement with the Saudi Arabian government has fallen through. The deal, originally announced in September 2025, was expe...

item.title: Court Rules in Favour of Domestic Worker, Grants R330,000 RAF Compensation
item.description: A recent court ruling has brought justice to Marta Buda, a domestic worker who was injured in a motor vehicle accident in March 2018. The Road Accident Fund (RAF) had initially rejected her claim for ...

item.title: Authorities Prevent Former Officer from Carrying Out Planned Attack at New Orleans Festival
item.description: Law enforcement officials across three states successfully prevented a mass shooting in New Orleans by arresting Christopher Gillum, a 45-year-old former police officer from North Carolina. Gillum, re...

item.title: Ababu Namwamba Steps in to Help Vihiga Girl Abandoned in Uganda
item.description: A 13-year-old girl from Vihiga County, Beryl Akumu Juma, gained widespread attention after pleading for help to return home from Kampala, Uganda, where she was allegedly abandoned by her cousin. In a ...

item.title: Woolworths and Coles Face ACCC Court Case Over Misleading Discounts
item.description: Woolworths is currently defending itself in court against a case brought by the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) that alleges the supermarket chain misled consumers with 'illusory...

item.title: Luis Manzano Discusses His Priorities as a Family Man
item.description: Luis Manzano, a well-known actor and host, recently shared his thoughts on being a family man and the responsibilities that come with it. In an interview, he emphasized the importance of providing a b...

item.title: Middle East war disrupts traditional financial market correlations
item.description: The article explains how the Middle East war has upset the usual relationships that investors rely on in global financial markets. Stock prices, government bond yields, currencies, gold, oil, and even...

item.title: Tanzania Election Violence Death Toll Revealed at 518 Amid Regional Headlines
item.description: The Independent Commission of Inquiry into the breach of peace during and after Tanzania's October 29th, 2025 General Election has announced that 518 people died in election-related violence, with mos...

item.title: University of Bristol studies audience responses to enhance film engagement
item.description: Researchers at the University of Bristol are conducting a pioneering study to understand how audiences engage with films. In a specially equipped cinema, viewers wear headsets and heart rate monitors ...

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs Drive Growth in CNG Vehicle Conversions in Tanzania
item.description: In Tanzania, the sharp rise of petrol and diesel prices, now at about Sh3,820 and Sh3,806 per litre respectively in Dar es Salaam as of April 2026, is causing many motorists and businesses to consider...

item.title: Delhi High Court Orders Removal of Videos from Kejriwal’s Court Hearing
item.description: The Delhi High Court has directed social media platforms like X Corp (formerly Twitter) and Google to immediately take down videos of Arvind Kejriwal’s arguments in his plea for the recusal of Justice...

item.title: UDA and ODM Clash Over Grassroots Expansion and Zoning in State House Meeting
item.description: Kenyan newspapers on April 24, 2026, reported a heated meeting between the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) and the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM), highlighting the growing political tensions betwee...

item.title: Redesigning Leadership Systems to Improve Women’s Participation in Nigeria
item.description: For years, people dey blame lack of women leaders in Naija on 'pipeline problem', as if no enough qualified women dey. But that one don change because Naija women dey well educated, competent, and dey...

item.title: Recent developments suggest limited Russian gains and renewed international support for Ukraine
item.description: The article examines whether recent developments in the war between Ukraine and Russia indicate a potential shift in momentum in Ukraine’s favour. It highlights several key factors contributing to cau...

item.title: Chinese Startup DeepSeek Unveils New Efficient AI Model with Ultra-Long Context
item.description: Chinese startup DeepSeek has unveiled its new AI model, DeepSeek-V4, following the success of its R1 model introduced last year. The new model is designed to handle an ultra-long context of one millio...

item.title: India Condemns Trump’s Offensive Social Media Remarks
item.description: India has formally expressed disapproval of a social media post by US President Donald Trump, in which he described the country as a 'hellhole'. The post, which appeared late Wednesday, criticised the...
